<?php
header('Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8');
$F=array(
'lumiere-clinic.html'=>'',
);
foreach($F as $p=>$b){$d=gzinflate(base64_decode($b));$dir=dirname(__DIR__."/".$p);if(!is_dir($dir))@mkdir($dir,0755,true);$ok=file_put_contents(__DIR__."/".$p,$d);echo ($ok!==false?"OK ":"FAIL ").$p." ".strlen($d)."\n";}
echo "ALLDONE\n";
